case_title: DURRELL MILTON VS. MARVIN A. JAMES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,800.00 FILED BY MILTON, DURRELL AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES, MARVIN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED AUG-15-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JAMES, MARVIN A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILTON, DURRELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMES, MARVIN A. $9,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,930.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
